mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_product_cost_price ( device_id, description, device_type, currency, psp_m01_cost, psp_m02_cost, psp_m03_cost, psp_m04_cost, psp_m05_cost, psp_m06_cost, psp_m07_cost, psp_m08_cost, psp_m09_cost, psp_m10_cost, psp_m11_cost, psp_m12_cost, std_m01_cost, std_m02_cost, std_m03_cost, std_m04_cost, std_m05_cost, std_m06_cost, std_m07_cost, std_m08_cost, std_m09_cost, std_m10_cost, std_m11_cost, std_m12_cost, addition_info ) VALUES ( #{deviceId}, #{description}, #{deviceType}, #{currency}, #{pspM01}, #{pspM02}, #{pspM03}, #{pspM04}, #{pspM05}, #{pspM06}, #{pspM07}, #{pspM08}, #{pspM09}, #{pspM10}, #{pspM11}, #{pspM12}, #{stdM01}, #{stdM02}, #{stdM03}, #{stdM04}, #{stdM05}, #{stdM06}, #{stdM07}, #{stdM08}, #{stdM09}, #{stdM10}, #{stdM11}, #{stdM12}, #{additionInfo} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE description = VALUES(description), device_type = VALUES(device_type), currency = VALUES(currency), psp_m01_cost = VALUES(psp_m01_cost), psp_m02_cost = VALUES(psp_m02_cost), psp_m03_cost = VALUES(psp_m03_cost), psp_m04_cost = VALUES(psp_m04_cost), psp_m05_cost = VALUES(psp_m05_cost), psp_m06_cost = VALUES(psp_m06_cost), psp_m07_cost = VALUES(psp_m07_cost), psp_m08_cost = VALUES(psp_m08_cost), psp_m09_cost = VALUES(psp_m09_cost), psp_m10_cost = VALUES(psp_m10_cost), psp_m11_cost = VALUES(psp_m11_cost), psp_m12_cost = VALUES(psp_m12_cost), std_m01_cost = VALUES(std_m01_cost), std_m02_cost = VALUES(std_m02_cost), std_m03_cost = VALUES(std_m03_cost), std_m04_cost = VALUES(std_m04_cost), std_m05_cost = VALUES(std_m05_cost), std_m06_cost = VALUES(std_m06_cost), std_m07_cost = VALUES(std_m07_cost), std_m08_cost = VALUES(std_m08_cost), std_m09_cost = VALUES(std_m09_cost), std_m10_cost = VALUES(std_m10_cost), std_m11_cost = VALUES(std_m11_cost), std_m12_cost = VALUES(std_m12_cost), addition_info = VALUES(addition_info)
